ghost.title: more cooking

tour.placeCaption: palette → fills the next empty slot

gingado.title: penguin wobble
gingado.sub: Pachinko sandbox — estimate the average payout and which penguin pays best.
gingado.editNote: Drag anything to match your screen. Bars have two ends — drag each to tilt. The dotted line is the throw's average aim.
gingado.compareHint: Drop a comparison to rank the three columns by average payout.
gingado.launchHint: The exit angle is sampled every throw — you don't aim. Randomness (±) is how wide that draw opens. Base tilt usually stays near 0; nudge it only if throws pull to one side. "Toward edges" makes a near-straight drop rare, like the real game.
gingado.warn: Elastic bounce plus obstacles make this chaotic: you can estimate the average over many balls, never the next one. The numbers are an approximation — only as good as how well the layout, angle randomness and bounce match the game. The real log is what calibrates it.
gingado.distHintEmpty: Pick a penguin and drop one (or run a batch) to see its distribution.
gingado.distHint: {name} penguin, {n} balls: 500 in {jp}%, touches a resource {hits}× on average.
gingado.realIntro: Tap the pot each ball actually landed in. The real average is what tells you whether the sim matches the game.
gingado.dataHint: Copy this to save it elsewhere, or paste a layout and apply.

tour.wobbleCaption: angle is sampled each drop · you don't aim
tour.editCaption: pins, bubbles, tilting bars — all movable
tour.simCaption: watch the average settle · log the real ones

tz.title: time tool
tz.sub: UTC anchored. Drag a pin and the whole list re-sorts.

tour.welcomeCaption: convert utc · both ways · all timezones
